string 2:
Production lines are inoperative... and the cause is
insufficient material.
{next}Having some trouble?
{next}What's wrong?
{next}What do you mean by "material"?

Affirmative. Production will remain halted if there's no
change in the situation.

With the Titan menace removed, it'd be nice to get the
production line operative again.

The raw material needed for production. Without it, the
line's ground to a halt.

We lost contact with LoaderLeomon, the one who moves
production material from the shaft.
{next}That's bad.
{next}Was there an accident?
{next}Maybe LoaderLeomon is just slacking off.

I want to assess the situation, but I can't leave my
station.

It's possible. Working in the mine shaft can be quite
dangerous.
That's a possibility. LoaderLeomon is known for being moody.

LoaderLeomon is feisty and rash. Maybe they believe the
Titan attack is still underway.

But their impulsiveness makes them fast at transporting
supplies... Could you look for them for me?

Tell LoaderLeomon that the Titan menace is over, and that
they must deliver the Chrondigizoit ore.
{next}I sure hope LoaderLeomon is safe.
{next}Chrome what...?
{next}"Digizoit"? Is that like a Digimon?

Indeed. I'm nearly as concerned for their well-being as I am
for the Chrondigizoit ore.
Chrondigizoit Metal. Shall I give a brief explanation?
Not in the slightest. It's a kind of ore.

Chrondigizoit is a hard ore that fuses with organic data,
refining into Chrondigizoit Metal

Chrondigizoit Metal is our most important
and precious commodity.

It's essential for reconstruction, as is LoaderLeomon for
mining and transporting it.
{next}I'll go look for LoaderLeomon.
{end}Hope you find LoaderLeomon, then!
You will? Thank you!

Indeed. I'll continue to wait until communication from
LoaderLeomon comes in.

I still can't contact LoaderLeomon in the shaft. Chrondigizoit 
ore delivery's delayed.
{next}I'll go look for LoaderLeomon.
{end}Hope you find LoaderLeomon, then!
You will? Thank you!

Indeed. I'll continue to wait until communication from
LoaderLeomon comes in.

Contact with LoaderLeomon was lost in the shaft. I'll send
you the coordinates.

LoaderLeomon is an excellent worker yet prone to violence.
Please exercise due caution.
Graaaaawr! Drill! Excavate! ...Who're you? Titan flunkies?!
{next}No.
{next}Guardromon is worried.
{next}Looks like my cover's blown.
I know a flunky would never admit it! I'm smart, see?!

Guardromon? Who's that? I'm having fun drilling now! Don't
bother me!
I knew it! There's no fooling me!

Anyone who interrupts my drilling fun time gets drilled,
too!
Damn, I lost... And to a Titan flunky, at that...
{next}I'm not with the Titans.
{next}You need to contact Guardromon.
{next}Get your friends and try again!

What? But now that you mention it... Just stay right there.
I'll ask Guardromon.

I was going to! I need to let Guardromon know there are
Titans in the shaft.

Yeah?! Just you wait! On my pride, me and my crew are going
to bash you to bits!
Beep, boop, beep...

It's me. There are some Titans here— What? They're gone? And
these guys cleared 'em out?

...Sorry about that! Looks like I jumped the gun! Let's head
back to see Guardromon.

Sorry to keep you waiting, Guardromon! Here! I brought the
goods!

Chrondigizoit ore confirmed. Now the restoration work can
resume.

Sorry for all the trouble I caused. Here's a little symbol
of my apology.

From now on, I'll make sure to haul the metal back instead
of just digging it up.

LoaderLeomon's back, and we can produce various metals now.
Stop by if you need any.

Production is going smoothly, thanks to your assistance.
Now, what can I do for you?
{next}I wanna repair Zudomon's hammer.
{next}I need to fix Blimpmon.
{end}Nothing right now.
{next}I wanna repair Zudomon's hammer.
{end}Nothing right now.

Mending the subject will require... Chrondigizoit Metal, is that
it?

Please take this. It's a precious material, but I can give
you a small portion.

Understood. Mending the subject will require a large amount
of metal, is that it?

Here. Take this. It's a lot, but you'll be fine if you get a
Digimon to carry it.

Well, goodbye for now. Please speak with me again if you
need further assistance.

Do you require something else? Production is proceeding
smoothly, so I can assist you.

I can provide you with materials on the spot, so please
speak with me if you need anything.
